headerDisplay: Automatically discovers and controls all Lyrion Media Server (LMS) players through HomeKit. Each player appears as a Fan (volume control) with SmartSpeaker controls (play/pause/stop). Works with Siri and automations.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: Display name for this platform instance

serverurl.title: LMS Server URL
serverurl.description: Full URL to your LMS server including port (default port is 9000)

updateInterval.title: Status Poll Interval (seconds)
updateInterval.description: How often to poll each player for play state and volume. Lower = more responsive but more LMS load.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Logs every RPC call and response. Enable only when troubleshooting – it is very verbose.
